message.body: ka1b3ast is now live! Streaming I Wanna Kill the Kamilia 3: Escaping secret 3 purgatory
have u played super meat boy?
how did u find the difficulty? it dont think it’s as hard as people say
im currently training in ssbu to beat my friends
I went out today with some family friends, it was a blast!
I wore a shorter dress today, my grandmother doesn't approve of it unless I wear tights with it
So I left the house in the tights then when I got in my car, I took them off snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
imma dress up as diddy kong next halloween
Well I shaved my legs and I did my toe nails, and I didn't want to cover them snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
Ooooh that's what you were doing!!
One of my family friends was making fun of my cravings snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
I burned my mouth again with my hot sauce craving...
Wait there's more after that bottom right corner??
I thought the bottom right was it!
Kai you're amazing but sisters before misters
But she is the superior sibling
No I haven't it looks like a weird geometry dash
I'm impressed you haven't raged yet
And a headache, I'm going to take something.
Okay I took something for the headache
Okay Kai are you ready for this??
Last night I was craving tea with lots of sugar and I drank that. Now, it sounds disgusting to me!
Round 1 is over of the tournament
Idk if you knew alr but someone got to f10 on ToSP but fell to f1 ending at 8th place
I clutched up tho with a 4th place on SoHP
Firework I was just telling Kai about what my cravings are doing to me.
On the 5th match we somehow clutched up with a 1st place
And then on the 6th match it was very rough but we ended in 6th
Bc of poor performance of other teams we ended up in a tied 7th place of the round, and team 4 and 6 had to do a tiebreaker
I think you can do it!
Team 6 barely beat the tiebreaker faster than team 4
By 0.4 seconds of the 5.5 minute run
I'll be back in a bit
Kai i might have a strat for that jump
Maybe line up in the center of the 2 spikes so you might be able to do a 1f jump and live
Bc the double jump is lower yoh might be able to do a 1f double jump
1f tap to the edge of the block
Then hold left and 1f after do a 1f double jump
Have you tried it in btool?
well im pretty sure you will do it today
I'm going to send you a DM
Okay you got a new DM snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
I spaced it out into different messages
What type of jump are you trying to do?
It looked like you were trying to jump higher
You got this Kai!! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
I want to chill with you a little longer! snwbeaLuv
This game for some reason does not allow you to fluke...
And you're like the king of fluking!
I might need to go to bed early tonight
I have a headache and I'm dizzy
I'm going to head off and rest myself a bit. Good luck! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
i went ustraaPausers  at this part
ye thats k3, with its tiny jumps
and the thing you just did
the strange things are multiple jump inputs
you can hear both jump sounds happen back to back
which is an interesting way to achieve a cancel
a jump cancel is typically done by holding one shift key down and then pressing another down and then releasing the other shift key 1 frame apart
ok i can hear you again
it seems like the rb button is just like, double pressing
i was also thinking about if there was some weird thing if ur arrow keys were like numpad arrows
but you wouldve noticed that sooner
yeah you need a low jump for this
the backtrack is relatively chill compared to what comes before it
theres like 3 ways to do that gate in the ground and all of them are hard
the simplest way is doing a short cancel and just doing it in one jump
but without cancels you gotta do some finesse
how many jump keys do you have bound?
that jump you sent in dms is EVIL.......
ok i was gonna ask whether theyre both on leftshift
you got this thoug youll clutch tf up
there are unique kinds of cancels you can do if you have two of the same shift key
@roaka_ oh i thought all cancels had to be with different shift keys
the most common, practical cancels just need left and right shift

basically when you release shift the game makes you stop going up, but you still go up for a little bit. having multiple of the same lets you fall sooner and be on positions you wouldnt be able to be on otherwise
and those kinds of jumps are called cactus jumps
youre not likely to randomly stumble onto one of those
and then there is chain cancelling which lets you do short cancels back to back but i dont know how those are done
the crystal radar was added into the game after breath of the wild though
crystal radar was only added in 2.0 which was like 2024
if you touch the wall to the right of the save you get the walk off align for that jump
it just tells you if you are in the same room as one
previously secret 3 would give you the avoidance timer
wait what item is in secret 4 again?
I might need a nap because I still have a headache.
there are 5 secret bosses but fortunately the one in stage 5 doesnt require secret 4
the first 4 are buffed versions of the boss rush bosses from k2
the creator of picture made two of the bosses that show up in k2 boss rush
you must carry the torch now
Oh shit it's a troll row!
I'm curious on how it will be!
I don't want you to eat it now
Can I tell you something m
If I was there, I would want to try one of everything you got from that box!
Oh yeah when you see the DM I sent you...
It might be what you predicted. snwbeaLol
Wait I don't call.yoy a dickhead
Yes you are an asshole snwbeaLol
I was just wondering if you were out I wasn't reminding you
I made it to 66K channel points!
And by the way I did not flip you off in DMs snwbeaLol

You did great tonight!! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv

Oh yeah you know I would if I could

I can't work more than 20 hours a week!
I wanted to work 25 hours a week during the school year. Legally I cannot!
Yeah it's because I'm a student
Okay I'm going to get ready to shower. Have a good rest of your stream Kai Bear!! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
